title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI development efficiency and team collaboration. The video recommends TypeScript over Python for AI projects, highlighting how language server protocols, type checking, and build-time error detection reduce runtime mistakes and friction when scaling AI teams.
